Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Eh, you can go. Just another one of 'em freak accidents.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Hey, kid. Sorry I took so long.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Says here your name's... Ken Amada. Is that right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Er... Geez... Sorry about what happened to your mom.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Heard she gave her life to protect you from the wreckage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Anyway, I gotta take your statement—since you're a witness and all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}If I told you what happened... would you believe me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Of course I would! Helping people out is our job.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Around midnight, when I got up to use the bathroom... I heard voices by the door...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I looked and saw this teenager, holding his head and yelling...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Hold on, you're saying he did it? But the whole house collapsed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}There was this shining, horse-like monster that came right out of him![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 3 25 25}It roared, and just like that, my mom and my house were—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Ohhh, a monster, was it? Haha... C'mon now, there's no way that actually happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Oh, um, sorry, I shouldn't laugh... It's just, sometimes after a traumatic incident like this, people can—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Look, kid... It was all an accident, plain and simple. A drunk driver crashed his car into your house.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}We've already found the car and what's left of the driver. Now all we need is an account of the accident.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 8 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}That's a lie! You're just making that up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I know you might think so, but... It's true.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Sergeant, can you come out here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Listen, I'm sorry for your loss, but... I have to go, uh... I hope things get better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Liar... You said you'd believe me![n]{f 1 1}
